item.title: Have some voice actors
item.description:
Technically not voice-acting, but it's too cool not to share. The voicechanger is a Sonovox.
It's almost as if voice actors have layers. Like an onion.
richardwells48 on tiktok, not sure if he's on instagram Surprisingly, quite a few people seem confused about what this is. PEGI is a rating system for games. Think of the movies like "PG-13" or "Rated R for adults". Y'know, the thing nobody cares about except sue-happy parents. Apparantly it's a Europe thing, when I thought it was an American thing. In hindsight, it's in the abbreviation, but honestly who even looks those up. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/PEGI
https://www.instagram.com/danieljferguson/
https://www.instagram.com/rob_paulsen/
Mel Blanc, Lucille Ball, Jerry Colonna and ??
Mel Blanc, Lucille Ball, Jerry Colonna and ??
item.dc:creator: cosonfused

item.title: The bottom shelf outdoor experience
item.description:
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
For the love of god, help us. We are drowning in memes and need you to save us by stealing some from discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Come heckle us. Follow the channel to be notified when we go live.
On August 7th, @FrothyStout and I are going to eat the weird shit you guys found at the grocery store, as well as whatever the hell is in these packages we'll be opening tonight.
I'm very curious what you guys think is "weird food."
Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala), Mr. Nutterbutt, and Taxi Bear backyard camping tax.
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: Such grace, many elegance.
item.description: Shima Enaga birb. The flying snowball.
item.dc:creator: mercbrit

item.title: Fresh(ish) Memes #195
item.dc:creator: ShaggyRoots

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1085 (creamy bouncy morning)
item.description:
Good morning. Or afternoon. Or hopefully, one time period in which is good for you at this moment, or one that comes soon. Let's get this bread.
I dreamed last night that for some reason, I rescued a Ruby-crowned Kinglet on vacation somewhere in this weird hostel, and it wouldn't stay put inside my shirt.
Yes. Yes we do.
Sometimes, this is me waking up briefly at 3am after going to bed early.
Feed your oppressors to the Land.
Also, arguably, Ancient-Classical Rome (Romulus to Romulus Augustulus), and the Eastern Roman Empire (Constantine I to Constantine VI)
I can't remember now what this flag was, making this meme less funny now, damn it.
Pippin would tell them I was a good boy.
Yeah. Don't do this.
@SecretHarpy
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: [Silence while preening himself]
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Couples who laugh together stay together! You just know he got her back for this, lmfao!
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: It's my 42nd today, grab a towel, don't panic and enjoy the dump.
item.description:
Most viral! Yay! Be kind, rewind.
Yesterday would've been his 16th birthday. But sadly he crossed the rainbow bridge last november.
item.dc:creator: RandomFinnishPerson

item.title: 24 yrs later and her stance against racism is just as important today as it was then! She's a yr gone, but what she stood for can't be let go!

item.dc:creator: Ngugi

item.title: Tribute to Francis - RIP sweet angel
item.description:
Francis died suddenly from liver failure. My heart is absolutely broken. Francis’s posts always brought a smile to my face.
Francis, hope you knew just how much joy you brought to the millions of people who came across your posts. You are gone but will never be forgotten.
item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: Well done France!! Lol
item.description: I didn't get to watch all of the ceremony, but from what I saw it wasn't the best but not the worst, but watching idiots like this asshole lose their shit over it is fucking hilarious and that makes it the best now! Lol

item.title: Everyone can do this
item.description:
Hey guys, here's a quick way for everyone to make a quick extra 8400$ a month.
This can definitely be done by anyone, so remember, if ur having issues with food insecurity, have you tried turning your 11 acres of land into a for rent dog park?

item.title: Dump and puppy
item.description:
Found him on the side of the road in the middle of nowhere.
Currently has been accepted by both dogs. Cats are mad but SLOWLY warming up. How could someone abandon this face? Vet appointment coming
